notes: Aberdeen research projects $7.2B in EC IT investment over next three years.

Aberdeen recommends IT organizations evaluate buying rather than building EC infrastructure.

metric_value: Majority of B2C companies will have 1st or 2nd gen EC by ~1999
notes: Prediction that most B2C companies roll out first/second generation EC systems within 3 years.

metric_value: Rapid but not overnight; exceptions see explosive growth
notes: Prediction that EC transaction volumes grow rapidly with some explosive outliers.

Java highlighted as an EC development tool.

metric_value: Fine-granularity individual personality; dynamic personalized catalogs
